children.label: A
children.text: A requirement for segregation of the waste at the point of generation where practicable.

children.label: B
children.text: A requirement for placement of the waste in containers that will protect waste handlers and the public from exposure.

children.label: C
children.text: A requirement for appropriate labeling of containers of the waste.

children.heading: Small quantities
children.label: b Small quantities
children.text: In the program under subsection (a), the Administrator may establish an exemption for generators of small quantities of medical waste listed under , except that the Administrator may not exempt from the program any person who, or facility that, generates 50 pounds or more of such waste in any calendar month.section 6992a of this title

children.heading: On-site incinerators
children.label: c On-site incinerators
children.text: Concurrently with the promulgation of regulations under subsection (a), the Administrator shall promulgate a recordkeeping and reporting requirement for any generator in a demonstration State of medical waste listed in that (1) incinerates medical waste listed in on site and (2) does not track such waste under the regulations promulgated under subsection (a). Such requirement shall require the generator to report to the Administrator on the volume and types of medical waste listed in that the generator incinerated on site during the 6 months following the effective date of the requirements of this subsection.section 6992a of this titlesection 6992a of this titlesection 6992a of this title

children.heading: Type of medical waste and types of generators
children.label: d Type of medical waste and types of generators
children.text: For each of the requirements of this section, the regulations may vary for different types of medical waste and for different types of medical waste generators.
